title: Mserver5 crashes on nested SELECT
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(a INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE x(b INTEGER, c1 TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO x(b, c1) VALUES (1, 'one'), (2, 'two'), (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT c1, (SELECT COUNT(a) FROM t WHERE a = b) AS c2 FROM x) AS dummy WHERE c1 = CAST(c2 AS TEXT);
key_bug_features: Nested SELECT causes Mserver5 to crash
